description_long: This helmet features a dark, almost black metallic shell with a subtle mottled texture, giving it a rugged and battle-worn appearance. Two large, upward-curving horns with a natural, striped pattern are mounted symmetrically on either side, adding an intimidating and dramatic flair. The front of the helmet is designed with a pronounced T-shaped opening for the eyes and mouth, providing both visibility and protection. The rear of the helmet is smooth and rounded, with visible rivets running vertically along the center seam, suggesting reinforced construction. The horns appear to be securely attached with metal fittings, and the overall form is robust, likely intended for ceremonial or fantasy-themed use. There are no visible logos, graphics, or ventilation features, and the interior is not visible but is likely hollow to accommodate a human head.
description: A dark, horned helmet with a rugged metallic finish and large, striped horns on each side. The front features a T-shaped opening for the face, and the design is bold and intimidating.
description_view_0: Front view shows the T-shaped face opening and both large, striped horns curving upward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the profile of the helmet and the full length and curvature of one horn.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back with a central seam and both horns visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other horn and the helmet's side profile.
